name: BB:Threats: X-Force Premium: Internal Host Communication with Cryptocurrency Mining URL for Events
notes: This Building Block triggers when an internal system communicates with a URL that is considered to be hosting Cryptocurrency Mining. It could be an indicator of a Cryptocurrency Mining malware infection.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining URL for Events
BB:Threats: X-Force Premium: Internal Host Communication with Cryptocurrency Mining URL for Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event context is Local to Remote
when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Proxy
when an event matches any of the following BB:Threats: Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining URL for Events
when the event matches URL Host (custom) is not N/A
when URL Host (custom) is categorized by X-Force as Cryptocurrency Mining
TD_list: APPLY BB:Threats: X-Force Premium: Internal Host Communication with Cryptocurrency Mining URL for Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event context is Local to Remote
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Proxy
AND NOT when an event matches any of the following BB:Threats: Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining URL for Events
AND when the event matches URL Host (custom) is not N/A
AND when URL Host (custom) is categorized by X-Force as Cryptocurrency Mining
